data: {"generalSituation":"A band of clouds will cover the coastal areas of Guangdong in the next couple of days. A trough of low pressure over central China is expected to develop into a cold front gradually during the weekend, and move across the coast of southern China on Sunday and Monday. It will bring showers and squally thunderstorms to the region. The associated northeast monsoon will bring slightly cooler weather to the region. A fresh easterly airstream will affect the coast of Guangdong midweek next week.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260501","week":"Friday","forecastWind":"East to northeast force 4, occasionally force 5 offshore.","forecastWeather":"Mainly cloudy.
